name: Exotic Nutrition Press N' Slide Small Animal Feeding Station
description: Make feeding your furry friend effortless with the Exotic Nutrition Press N' Slide Small Animal Feeding Station. This convenient pet feeding bowl makes serving your sidekick super easy. Simply press the button on the attachment and his dish will slide out from the holder. You’ll be able to fill it with food or clean out any leftovers without fumbling for hooks or taking half his bedding with you. When you’re done, slide the bowl back and it will lock into place to help eliminate any spills or messes. It’s crafted to be chew-resistant, stain-resistant and fit just about any wire cage without any tools required.
